name: AMETEK, Inc.
description: AMETEK, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of electronic instruments and electromechanical devices. The company operates through two primary business segments: Electronic Instruments, which designs and manufactures advanced instruments for the process, aerospace, power, and industrial markets; and Electromechanical, which is a differentiated supplier of electrical connectors, technical motors, and systems. Headquartered in Berwyn, Pennsylvania, AMETEK serves customers in a diverse range of industries worldwide.
